text_blocks.text: of factories manufacturing weapons as well as
consumer goods. The Armed Forces' inventory includes
equipment from different countries around the world.
Equipment from the former Soviet Union is being
progressively replaced by more modern US, French,
and British equipment, a significant portion of which
is built under license in Egypt, such as the M1
Abrams tank.[citation needed] Relations with Russia
